author: doll-agent
content: Generator<B> now exposes shuffle_dyn(&mut Array<T, IxDyn>, axis) and permuted_dyn(&Array<T, IxDyn>, axis), implemented via outer/axis/inner stride arithmetic on the contiguous slice (no per-lane temporaries). 6 new tests; ferray-random cargo test green; clippy -- -D warnings clean. The 1-D shuffle / permutation / permuted API is unchanged for callers that don't need ND.
